episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

1.premise: Adults suppress silliness in favor of outrage and detachment.
Detached audiences need a command to become silly.

2.premise: Jewish comics losing silliness explains a comic's wilderness retreat.

1.premise: Sex is like reheated fries because both become disappointing leftovers.
Attraction is like a rocket countdown because proximity lowers the number.

lines.text: - Guys, what happened to silly people?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like everybody in this country just wanna be upset
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or the sadness or the madness,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I just wanna be silly.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And across your arms, niggas silly up.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You see what I'm talking about?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Why are you just, you ain't come here to have a good time?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You laughing through YouTube.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: What happened to the silly laughs that used to,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: we used to have goofy ass laughs at comedy niggas
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because y'all don't even do that no more.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Do y'all remember silly Jews?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Do y'all remember Jews were the silliest people
lines.label: setup

lines.text: America, Larry David, and Seinfeld and Sarah Silverman's finance. Y'all remember that?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Just fucking Ari went into the wilderness for a year because he couldn't be silly anymore.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And we just need to just let that out. I don't know why. It's just because I just wanted to say
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: that so I could do this silly joke real fast that I wrote down just to get y'all to my set.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: "Dang, yo, X is a lot like reheatin' french fries."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "All right, I'ma do the next one. I --"
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: "Sir, you ever been here with the rocket ship effect?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The rocket ship effect. You know what that is?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's when you see somebody that's attractive
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they walkin' towards you and you're like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: All right, y'all, that's my time. I love y'all.
lines.label: fluff
